===Pokémon Evolutions===
Lusamine appeared in ''[[PE02|The Eclipse]]''. She was first seen in a flashback at [[Aether Paradise]], berating [[Lillie]] for leaving her before opening an [[Ultra Wormhole]] in order to go and stop {{p|Necrozma}}. She and [[Guzma]] later fell out of another wormhole at the [[Altar of the Moone]], badly hurt by Necrozma and telling Lillie and {{ga|Selene}} to run.
